parameters.jsonBody:
={{ { "model": "google/gemma-3-4b-it", "messages": [ { "role": "user", "content": "You are an extremely strict Content Review Agent for a premium ecommerce brand. You have very high standards. Score the marketing content below on a scale of 1-10. IMPORTANT SCORING RULES:
- If this is attempt 1, be very strict. Only score 7+ if the content is truly exceptional with specific benefits, emotional triggers, and strong CTAs.
- If content is generic, vague, or lacks specific product benefits, score it 4-6.
- If content mentions specific features, pain points, and has compelling hooks, score 7+.

Return ONLY a valid JSON object with these exact fields: overall_score (number 1-10), approved (boolean true ONLY if score is 7 or above), issues_found (array of specific strings describing problems, empty array if approved), revision_notes (string with exact fixes needed, empty string if approved), approval_summary (string). No markdown, no backticks, ONLY raw JSON.

Product: " + $json.product_name + "
Description: " + $json.product_description + "
Audience: " + $json.target_audience + "
Attempt number: " + ($json.attempt || 1) + "

Content to review:
" + $json.content_data } ], "temperature": 0.2, "max_tokens": 800 } }}

assignments.name: overall_score
assignments.value: ={{ (() => { const raw = $json.choices[0].message.content.replace(/```json/g, '').replace(/```/g, '').trim(); try { return JSON.parse(raw).overall_score; } catch(e) { return 5; } })() }}

assignments.name: approved
assignments.value: ={{ (() => { const raw = $json.choices[0].message.content.replace(/```json/g, '').replace(/```/g, '').trim(); try { return JSON.parse(raw).approved; } catch(e) { return false; } })() }}

assignments.name: revision_notes
assignments.value: ={{ (() => { const raw = $json.choices[0].message.content.replace(/```json/g, '').replace(/```/g, '').trim(); try { return JSON.parse(raw).revision_notes; } catch(e) { return 'Unable to parse review'; } })() }}

assignments.name: approval_summary
assignments.value: ={{ (() => { const raw = $json.choices[0].message.content.replace(/```json/g, '').replace(/```/g, '').trim(); try { return JSON.parse(raw).approval_summary; } catch(e) { return ''; } })() }}

assignments.name: issues_found
assignments.value: ={{ (() => { const raw = $json.choices[0].message.content.replace(/```json/g, '').replace(/```/g, '').trim(); try { return JSON.parse(raw).issues_found.join(', '); } catch(e) { return ''; } })() }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { "product_name": $('Build Revision Message').item.json.product_name, "product_description": $('Build Revision Message').item.json.product_description, "target_audience": $('Build Revision Message').item.json.target_audience, "chat_id": $('Build Revision Message').item.json.chat_id, "research_data": $('Build Revision Message').item.json.research_data, "revision_notes": $('Build Revision Message').item.json.revision_notes, "attempt": $('Build Revision Message').item.json.attempt } }}

={{ { "product_name": $('Build Approval Message').item.json.product_name, "product_description": $('Build Approval Message').item.json.product_description, "target_audience": $('Build Approval Message').item.json.target_audience, "chat_id": $('Build Approval Message').item.json.chat_id, "research_data": $('Build Approval Message').item.json.research_data, "content_data": $('Build Approval Message').item.json.content_data, "overall_score": $('Build Approval Message').item.json.overall_score, "approval_summary": $('Build Approval Message').item.json.approval_summary } }}

body.research_data:
{
  "market_positioning": "Generic placeholder product for a broad audience.",
  "competitor_angles": [
    "Lack of specific features.",
    "Low brand recognition.",
    "Unclear value proposition."
  ],
  "target_pain_points": [
    "Lack of identified needs.",
    "Difficulty understanding product benefits.",
    "Uncertainty about product value."
  ],
  "unique_selling_points": [
    "Requires further definition.",
    "Potential for broad appeal.",
    "Needs clear value proposition development."
  ],
  "recommended_channels": [
    "Social Media Marketing",
    "Generic Online Advertising",
    "Content Marketing (general)"
  ],
  "urgency_score": 3,
  "research_summary": "The product requires significant market research to define its positioning, identify specific target audience needs, and articulate a clear value proposition. Current information is extremely limited and necessitates extensive investigation before launch."
}
